title: encephalosphaera puberula
intro: Encephalosphaera puberula is a type of flowering plant, belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Encephalosphaera puberula is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed orally, depending on the desired health benefit.
